author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Microsoft Flight Simulator | Expert Series 02: The Piper M600
Now you can own the Piper M600 in Microsoft Flight Simulator! The M600 is a six-seat, single-engine, multi-use light civil airplane developed and manufactured by Piper Aircraft of the United States. Introduced in 2015, the M600 is an advanced member of the Piper M-Class. Boasting state-of-the-art avionics, and luxurious passenger accommodations, the versatile M600 is a coveted choice for a variety of private and business applications. Pilots hail the sleek, low-wing monoplane for its great range, speed, advanced cockpit, and reliable and efficient operation. 

Grab it in the Marketplace today. The sky is calling!  

https://www.xbox.com/games/microsoft-flight-simulator

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Atelier Karia: The Night Kingdom & the Guide of Memories - First Trailer
Reawaken the past, savor the present. 
A vast fantasy alchemy RPG of memories and discovery.

This entry in the Atelier series focuses on tying in alchemy to deepen every aspect of the game.

Synthesized items can now be used for more than just combat. They will assist you during exploration and base-building, and will help shape the very path of your adventure.

Karia can also eat synthesized items to change both her appearance and abilities.

Synthesize items, use them on your adventure, and eat them.

This cycle will tie everything together in this new evolution of the Atelier series.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/atelier-karia-the-night-kingdom-the-guide-of-memories/9n6hnlvw5rjv

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Beastro | Launch Trailer
Beastro is OUT NOW on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX Game Pass!

Not all heroes wield swords. Some prefer the spoon. 🍲✨

Welcome to Beastro, a heartwarming culinary adventure where great food can change the world. Step into the shoes of a chef, gather fresh ingredients, craft delicious meals, and help prepare the brave Caretakers of Palo Pori for the journeys ahead.

Build your restaurant, discover new recipes, and prove that sometimes the best way to save the world is with a really good meal!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/beastro/9NJRSC0B0K88
